name: property managers handling 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 rental units, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection tracking and delinquency reporting instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking rent payments and managing delinquency reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking rent payments and managing delinquency reports.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 rental units, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection tracking and delinquency reporting instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of rent payments and delinquency reports via spreadsheets

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 rental units, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection tracking and delinquency reporting instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
